reviews.comment:
El desayuno rico,pero la atención estropea la visita. Las dos dependientas que estaban trabajando el sábado 31/5/25 a las 8:30 ni siquiera te miraban a la cara y parecía que les molestaba atender. Si no estás de buen humor o no te gusta tu trabajo,yo no tengo la culpa.

(Translated by Google)
The breakfast was good, but the service ruined the visit. The two waitresses who were working on Saturday, May 31, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. wouldn't even look at you and seemed annoyed at serving you. If you're not in a good mood or don't like your job, that's not my fault.
